canonical_definition: The tendency of an LLM to persist in an incorrect stance despite valid corrective feedback, reflecting overconfidence or over-reliance on parametric knowledge.
papers: NL-Debugging: Exploiting Natural Language as an Intermediate Representation for Code Debugging
